meaning: adj.用帕尔马干酪调制的,撒有帕尔马干酪的
examples: Launched in September 2008 and now called the "Parma reg" by regulars, the beef burger features Italy's popular Parmigiano Reggiano cheese, as well as other key regional ingredients.
It is not true of Parmigiano-Reggiano, which strives for one perfect taste and texture.
He took the dish away and replaced it with gnocchi tossed with fresh peas, Parmigiano-Reggiano and mushrooms.
It turns out that Parmigiano-Reggiano contains more umami elements than almost any other cheese (or any food).
